examples: Your test was completely correct, you get 10 out of 10
We all agreed they'd made the correct decision.

definitions.text: With good manners; well behaved; conforming with accepted standards of behaviour.

examples: Hope I spelt your name correct.

definitions.text: Used to indicate acknowledgement or acceptance.
To make something that was wrong become right; to remove error from.
examples: You'll need to correct your posture if you're going to be a professional dancer.
The navigator corrected the course of the ship.
The teacher stayed up all night correcting exams.
It's rude to correct your parents.
